name: model_search
description: Find Machine Learning models hosted on Hugging Face. Returns comprehensive information about matching models including downloads, likes, tags, and direct links.

query.description: Search term. Leave blank and specify sort and limit to get e.g. Top 20 trending models

author.description: Organization or user who created the model (e.g. google, meta-llama, microsoft)

task.description: Model task type (e.g. text-generation, image-classification, translation)

library.description: Framework the model uses (e.g. transformers, diffusers, timm)

sort.description: Sort order: trendingScore, downloads, likes, createdAt, lastModified

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: model_details
description: Get detailed information about a model from the Hugging Face Hub including architecture, training data, evaluation results, and direct download links.

model_id.description: The model ID to retrieve details for (e.g. google/gemma-2b)

name: dataset_search
description: Find Datasets hosted on the Hugging Face hub. Returns comprehensive information about matching datasets including downloads, likes, tags, and direct links.

author.description: Organization or user who created the dataset

sort.description: Sort order: trendingScore, downloads, likes, createdAt, lastModified

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: dataset_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific dataset on Hugging Face including description, features, splits, and usage examples.

dataset_id.description: The dataset ID to retrieve details for (e.g. openai/gsm8k)

name: paper_search
description: Find Machine Learning research papers on the Hugging Face hub. Returns paper details including authors, abstract, and links.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: hub_repo_search
description: Search Hugging Face repositories with a shared query interface for models, datasets, and spaces. Returns results across all repository types.

repo_type.description: Type of repository: model, dataset, or space

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: hub_repo_details
description: Get details for one or more Hugging Face repos (model, dataset, or space) including metadata, files, and usage statistics.

name: duplicate_space
description: Duplicate a Hugging Face Space into the user's account. Creates a new space with the same configuration and files.

newSpaceId.description: Name for the new space (optional, defaults to source space-name)

hardware.description: Either freecpu or zerogpu (defaults based on source). Both options are in the free tier.

private.description: Whether the new space should be public or private

name: space_info
description: Get information about a Hugging Face Space including its runtime, hardware, and status.

name: space_files
description: List files in a Hugging Face Space repository.

path.description: Optional subdirectory path to list files from

name: hf_doc_search
description: Search Hugging Face documentation using semantic search. Returns relevant documentation sections.

library.description: Specific library to search docs for (e.g. transformers, diffusers, datasets)

name: hf_doc_fetch
description: Fetch a specific Hugging Face documentation page by URL.

url.description: URL of the documentation page to fetch

name: use_space
description: Give the User access to a Hugging Face Space with mcp_ui. The space must have a Gradio interface.

space_id.description: The space ID to use (e.g. username/space-name)
